criteria used lenders determine qualify home financing your debt-to-income (DTI) ratio.
This formula helps lenders determine have capacity meet your monthly debt obligations, including expense associated with your home.
There multiple components your total monthly housing expense that lender will consider when calculating your DTI.
These include only principal interest payments that will make each month also your property taxes homeowners insurance.
some borrowers, total monthly housing expense will also include mortgage insurance, flood insurance homeowners' association (HOA) condo dues.
